_publications._publicationTitle: Kinome Profiling of NF1-Related MPNSTs in Response to Kinase Inhibition and Doxorubicin Reveals Therapeutic Vulnerabilities.

_contextSnippet: The most uniform tumor inhibition was observed in the NF1 MPNST tumors, whereas some NF1-P53 tumors still displayed aggressive growth after 21 days
details: Most uniform tumor inhibition observed in NF1 MPNST tumors, while some NF1-P53 tumors displayed aggressive growth after 21 days
